question: Where is the basketball player located? Select from the following options: (A) In the foreground on the left. (B) In the background on the left. (C) In the foreground on the right. (D) In the background on the right.
gold_answer: In the foreground on the right
answer_choices: In the foreground on the left
In the background on the left
In the foreground on the right
In the background on the right
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
